title: How to Improve Skin Elasticity After 40 (What Science Actually Supports)
seo_title: How to Improve Skin Elasticity After 40: What Works
meta_description: Skin elasticity drops after 40 as collagen and elastin decline. Learn what science actually supports for restoring firmness, texture, and bounce in your skin.
